title: TextField and InputDecoration
description: Creating text input fields with styling.

slides.title: TextField 📝
slides.content:
# TextField

`TextField` is the most common input widget for text.

* Use `controller` to access and modify the text.
* `decoration` parameter takes an `InputDecoration` for labels, hints, icons, etc.
* `onChanged` callback for real-time updates.
* `onSubmitted` for when the user finishes.

quizData.question: Which property of TextField is used to style the border, label, and hint?
quizData.explanation: The decoration property takes an InputDecoration.

slides.title: Basic TextField
slides.content: A simple TextField with a label:

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use TextEditingController

For more control (e.g., clearing the field), create a `TextEditingController` and dispose it in `StatefulWidget`.
